title: Diagnose complex faults in LPG fuel systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose complex faults in LPG fuel systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and confirm the work requirement

pcs.text: Determine nature and objective of diagnosis requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Confirm existence of fault in LPG fuel system from direct or indirect evidence1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks according to workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine nature and objective of diagnosis requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Confirm existence of fault in LPG fuel system from direct or indirect evidence1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks according to workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine nature and objective of diagnosis requirements from workplace instructions 1.2 Confirm existence of fault in LPG fuel system from direct or indirect evidence1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks according to workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify and confirm the work requirement

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose complex faults

pcs.text: Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and other technical information for LPG fuel system 2.2 Identify diagnostic procedures and options 2.3 Select diagnostic method sequence, tests and testing processes from the range of available options2.4 Select and prepare testing equipment according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.5 Identify, select and prepare tools, equipment and materials required to support the diagnostic process for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and other technical information for LPG fuel system 2.2 Identify diagnostic procedures and options 2.3 Select diagnostic method sequence, tests and testing processes from the range of available options2.4 Select and prepare testing equipment according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.5 Identify, select and prepare tools, equipment and materials required to support the diagnostic process for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and interpret manufacturer specifications and other technical information for LPG fuel system 2.2 Identify diagnostic procedures and options 2.3 Select diagnostic method sequence, tests and testing processes from the range of available options2.4 Select and prepare testing equipment according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.5 Identify, select and prepare tools, equipment and materials required to support the diagnostic process for use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare to diagnose complex faults

elements.title: Apply diagnostic procedures

pcs.text: Follow selected diagnostic process and carry out testing according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Confirm diagnostic findings, as required, by using alternative or optional process according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Draw and document conclusions from findings according to workplace procedures, and develop recommendations for required repairs that comply with AS/NZS 1425 LP Gas fuel systems for vehicle engines3.4 Provide conclusions to required personnel or customer to confirm further action to be taken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow selected diagnostic process and carry out testing according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Confirm diagnostic findings, as required, by using alternative or optional process according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Draw and document conclusions from findings according to workplace procedures, and develop recommendations for required repairs that comply with AS/NZS 1425 LP Gas fuel systems for vehicle engines3.4 Provide conclusions to required personnel or customer to confirm further action to be taken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow selected diagnostic process and carry out testing according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Confirm diagnostic findings, as required, by using alternative or optional process according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Draw and document conclusions from findings according to workplace procedures, and develop recommendations for required repairs that comply with AS/NZS 1425 LP Gas fuel systems for vehicle engines3.4 Provide conclusions to required personnel or customer to confirm further action to be taken.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply diagnostic procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
